title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Biocon Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Biocon Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Biocon Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Biocon Digital Technologies:
Biocon Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
